question_text: Find the perimeter of a triangle whose vertices are \( (3,2), (4,5), (6,2) \). Give your answer in surd form.
Find the \(7^{\text{th}}\) term of the sequence \(-10, 50, -250, \ldots\).
The scores of students in a test are: \(4,3,3,2,1,2,5,7,8,3,5\). Find the mode.
explanation: Frequencies: \(3\) appears 3 times (highest). So the mode is \(3\).

question_text: \(P(x,4)\) and \(Q(10,8)\) are joined by a straight line. If the midpoint is \((9,6)\), find \(x\).
